untranslatable_reason: This signal requires calculation of theoretical fair value based on futures pricing model (spot + dividends - carrying costs with time decay), risk-free rate adjustments, and mispricing percentage. The allowed indicator set contains only technical price/volume indicators and does not include: (1) futures price data, (2) spot index price, (3) dividend payout data, (4) risk-free rate input, (5) days-to-expiration calculation, (6) fair value computation capability, or (7) mispricing percentage derivation. This is a fundamental/derivatives arbitrage signal requiring market data and financial calculations outside the scope of technical chart indicators.
translation_notes: Source text references a specific example (futures=432.70, 42 days to expiration, 6% rates) but provides no complete parameter thresholds. The signal logic depends entirely on external market inputs (futures quotes, spot prices, rate data) and financial calculations that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and technical indicators. This requires a dedicated arbitrage pricing engine, not a technical indicator-based backtest system.
